Column.name: Note
Column.value: An Application Component represents an encapsulation of application functionality aligned to implementation structure, which is modular and replaceable. (ArchiMate 3.1)

Column.name: Notes
Column.value: You can have elements from the Technology Architecture layer (say a Device) serving an element from the Application Architecture layer (say a Component), which serves a component from the Business Architecture layer (say a Business Service), which realizes an element from the Motivation Layer (Say Goal). There is no other modeling language than ArchiMate that can make all this mixture in one place.
